description: Frontend test suite: Vitest + @vue/test-utils + happy-dom covering utils, composables, stores, components, and router guards

userStories.title: Setup test infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Vitest configured with happy-dom, test helpers, and npm scripts so that frontend tests can run.
acceptanceCriteria: Install vitest, @vue/test-utils, happy-dom as dev deps in apps/app
Create apps/app/vitest.config.ts extending vite config with happy-dom environment and path aliases
Create apps/app/src/__tests__/helpers/setup.ts with mountWithPlugins (vue-i18n with fr locale + Pinia)
Add test:app, test:app:watch, test:app:coverage scripts to root package.json
bun run test:app executes without errors (0 tests found is OK)
userStories.notes: Tests run on host, not Docker. tsconfig.app.json already excludes __tests__. tsconfig.node.json already includes vitest.config.*

userStories.title: Add ApiError unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for ApiError parsing, is(), isAuthError(), and getLocalizedMessage().
acceptanceCriteria: Test new ApiError(response) parses code, statusCode, message, details
Test getLocalizedMessage(t) returns i18n key for known codes
Test getLocalizedMessage(t) returns detail message for unknown codes
Test isAuthError() → true for 401, UNAUTHORIZED, FORBIDDEN, TOKEN_EXPIRED, INVALID_CREDENTIALS
Test isAuthError() → false for NOT_FOUND, VALIDATION_ERROR
Test parseApiError(response) parses JSON error body

userStories.title: Add coordinate utils tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for WGS84↔LV95 conversion, null handling, and URL builders.
acceptanceCriteria: Test round-trip WGS84 → LV95 → WGS84 within tolerance
Test buildGeoAdminUrl() → valid URL with correct params
Test buildGoogleMapsUrl() → valid Google Maps URL

userStories.title: Add date utils tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for date formatting, parsing, and relative dates with fr-CH locale.
acceptanceCriteria: Test formatRelativeDate(5 days ago) → 'Il y a 5 jours'

userStories.title: Add debounce utils tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for debounce and debounceAsync with fake timers.
acceptanceCriteria: Test debounce(fn, 100) calls fn once after delay
Test multiple rapid calls → only last one executes
Test debounceAsync has same behavior with promises

userStories.title: Add text utils tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for truncateText edge cases.

userStories.title: Add CSV export utils tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for escapeCSV, generateCSV, getNestedValue, and format helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: Test generateCSV(columns, data) → valid CSV with headers

userStories.title: Add useAlert composable tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for useAlert add/remove, max limit, auto-dismiss, and helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: Test addAlert({type:'success', message:'ok'}) adds to alerts array
Test max 5 alerts → oldest removed when 6th added
Test auto-dismiss after timeout with fake timers
Test successAlert('msg') and errorAlert('msg') set correct type

userStories.title: Add useActivityLock composable tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for activity locking with date checks, admin bypass, and role logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Test canEditActivity combines lock + role checks

userStories.title: Add useDateRangePresets composable tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for today/week/month/year presets, shift, detect, and normalise.
acceptanceCriteria: Test normaliseFromDate / normaliseToDate → start/end of day

userStories.title: Add useFormat composable tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for currency, percentage, duration, date, and nl2br formatting.

userStories.title: Add useUnsavedChanges composable tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for dirty/clean state and beforeunload behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Test markDirty() → isDirty = true, hasUnsavedChanges = true

userStories.title: Add useGet/usePost API composable tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for loading state, data, error handling, auth headers, and 401→logout.
acceptanceCriteria: Test useGet calls fetch with GET + auth headers
Test useGet sets loading=true during request, false after
Test useGet sets data on success
Test useGet sets error on failure, parses ApiError
Test usePost calls fetch with POST + JSON body
Test network error → error state set

userStories.title: Add useLogin composable tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for login success→token+user and failure→error.
acceptanceCriteria: Test successful login returns token + user

userStories.title: Add auth store tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for login, logout, token storage, role checks, and localStorage hydration.
acceptanceCriteria: Test login(email, pass) calls API, stores token in state + localStorage
Test login failure returns false, no token stored
Test isRole('admin') with admin user → true
Test isRole('admin') with user role → false
Test hydration from localStorage on store init

userStories.title: Add appSettings store tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for default basePath, set/reset, and getAbsolutePath.

userStories.title: Add Button atom component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for Button rendering, click emit, disabled, and loading states.
userStories.notes: Atom components don't use i18n — text via props/slots

userStories.title: Add Input atom component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for Input rendering, v-model, disabled, and error states.

userStories.title: Add InputNumber atom component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for InputNumber rendering, v-model, min/max, and step.

userStories.title: Add Select atom component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for Select rendering options, selection emit, and placeholder.
acceptanceCriteria: Test placeholder shown when no value

userStories.title: Add Checkbox atom component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for Checkbox checked/unchecked, toggle emit, and disabled.

userStories.title: Add Badge atom component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for Badge rendering and variant styling.

userStories.title: Add DataTable molecule component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for DataTable columns/rows, sort emit, empty state, and loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Test click header emits sort event

userStories.title: Add Dialog molecule component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for Dialog open/close, backdrop click, and slot content.

userStories.title: Add ConfirmDialog molecule component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for ConfirmDialog message, confirm emit, and cancel emit.

userStories.title: Add FormField molecule component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for FormField label, error message, and required indicator.

userStories.title: Add DateRange molecule component tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for DateRange inputs, preset buttons, and shift navigation.

userStories.title: Add router guard tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for auth redirects, admin gate, and public route access.
acceptanceCriteria: Test requiresAuth: false → allow without auth
Test /login when authenticated → allow (no redirect loop)
